Privacy Policy

Last updated: {{ lastUpdated }}

At yProHub, your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what personal data we collect, how we use and protect it, and the rights you have over your information. It applies to all users of the yProHub platform — including consumers who post jobs and professionals (Pros) who offer services.

By using yProHub you agree to the collection and use of your information as described here. If you do not agree, please stop using the platform.

1. Who Controls Your Data

yProHub operates as the data controller for information collected through this platform. If you have questions about how your data is handled, contact us at privacy@yprohub.com.

2. What Data We Collect

Account & Identity

  • Full name, email address, and password (stored as a one-way hash — we never see your password in plain text)
  • Phone number (used for SMS verification and contact purposes)
  • User type (Consumer or Pro) and account role

Address & Location

  • Home or business address you provide during registration or when posting a job
  • Latitude and longitude (derived from your address for proximity-based matching)
  • Service area you define as a Pro

Job & Service Activity

  • Job postings: title, description, budget, timeline, and attachments you upload
  • Bids you submit or receive, including proposed amounts and messages
  • Job status history (accepted, completed, disputed, etc.)
  • Reviews and ratings you give or receive

Payment Information

  • Transaction records: amount, status, and timestamps
  • We do not store card numbers, CVVs, or raw bank details — payment processing is handled by Razorpay, whose own Privacy Policy applies to that data

Communications

  • Messages exchanged between users and Pros via the in-app messaging system
  • Notifications sent to you (job updates, bid alerts, completion confirmations)

Technical & Usage Data

  • IP address, browser type, and device information collected in server logs
  • Pages visited and features used (used for debugging and improving the platform)
  • Authentication tokens (stored in your browser's local storage; cleared on logout)

3. How We Use Your Data

  • Provide the service — match users with Pros, process payments, deliver notifications
  • Verify identity — confirm email addresses and phone numbers to reduce fraud
  • Security — detect and prevent unauthorised access, abuse, and spam
  • Support — investigate disputes, respond to queries, and resolve issues
  • Legal compliance — meet obligations under applicable laws including India's DPDP Act 2023, GDPR (for EU users), and financial regulations
  • Platform improvement — analyse aggregated, anonymised usage patterns to improve features

We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We do not use your data for profiling or automated decision-making that produces significant legal effects.

4. Legal Basis for Processing

We process your data under one or more of the following bases:

  • Contract — processing necessary to fulfil the services you requested
  • Legal obligation — compliance with applicable laws and regulations
  • Legitimate interests — fraud prevention, platform security, and service improvement
  • Consent — where you have explicitly agreed (e.g., marketing communications)

5. Who We Share Your Data With

We share data only where necessary:

  • Pros / Consumers — when a job is matched, relevant contact and job details are shared between the parties to that agreement
  • Payment processor (Razorpay) — transaction data required to process payments
  • SMS provider (Msg91) — your phone number, used only to send verification codes and job alerts
  • Email provider (SMTP) — your email address, used to deliver account and job notifications
  • Hosting infrastructure — our cloud hosting provider processes data solely on our behalf under a data processing agreement
  • Law enforcement — if required by a valid legal order or to protect the safety of users

All third-party processors are bound by confidentiality agreements and may not use your data for their own purposes.

6. How Long We Keep Your Data

  • Active accounts — data is retained for as long as your account is active
  • Deleted accounts — personal data is anonymised or deleted within 30 days of a verified deletion request, except where retention is legally required
  • Payment records — retained for 7 years to comply with financial and tax regulations
  • Verification codes — deleted automatically after 15 minutes (expired codes) or immediately after use
  • Revoked tokens — purged from the database once the token's original expiry passes

7. Cookies & Local Storage

yProHub uses browser local storage (not cookies) to store your authentication token and session preferences. This data stays on your device and is cleared when you log out or clear your browser storage. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising cookies.

If you use a browser that restricts local storage, some features (including staying logged in) will not work correctly.

8. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

  • Access — request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
  • Correction — ask us to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
  • Deletion — request deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten"), subject to legal retention requirements
  • Portability — receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format
  • Objection — object to processing based on legitimate interests
  • Withdraw consent — where processing is based on consent, withdraw it at any time without affecting prior processing

To exercise any of these rights, email us at privacy@yprohub.com. We will respond within 30 days. You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

9. Security

We implement industry-standard safeguards to protect your data:

  • Passwords are hashed using BCrypt — they are never stored in plain text
  • All API communication is over HTTPS/TLS
  • JWT access tokens expire after 15 minutes; refresh tokens rotate on each use
  • Revoked tokens are blacklisted server-side and rejected on all subsequent requests
  • Rate limiting is applied to authentication endpoints to prevent brute-force attacks

No system is entirely breach-proof. If we become aware of a security incident that affects your data, we will notify you as required by applicable law.

10. Children's Privacy

yProHub is not directed at children under 18. We do not knowingly collect personal data from anyone under 18. If you believe a child has provided us with personal data, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated by email or a prominent notice on the platform at least 14 days before they take effect. Your continued use of yProHub after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

12. Contact & Complaints

  • Email: privacy@yprohub.com
  • General support: Contact Page
  • Terms of Service: Terms of Service
